routes.name: Shared Island Cluster-to-Cluster Project Development Fund
routes.source_readback: Call opens 2 June 2026 and closes 17 July 2026, 1.30pm. Applications should include at least one cluster from each jurisdiction.
routes.route_decision: Potential NI/Ireland collaboration route but not standalone; requires eligible cluster partner in the opposite jurisdiction.
routes.next_action: Prepare a one-page cluster partner brief and contact SIClusters@intertradeireland.com only after partner/cluster role is defined.

routes.name: EIT Health Innovation Uptake Call 2026
routes.source_readback: Opens 24 June 2026, closes 16 September 2026 15:00. Maximum funding per project EUR650k, up to 50% of total project costs, led by a commercialising entity; requires a multi-country consortium and clinically validated digital or AI-powered healthcare solution.
routes.route_decision: Aureon Evidence OS has AI workflow relevance, but current evidence does not prove a regulated clinically validated digital medical device or healthcare consortium.
routes.next_action: Monitor and use only if a regulated healthcare partner, clinical validation evidence and EU/UK consortium are obtained.

routes.name: Horizon Europe Chips Joint Undertaking 2026
routes.source_readback: ECS resilience calls expected to open 7 July 2026 with 16 September 2026 deadline; skills calls close 24 September 2026. UK organisations can apply as part of a consortium with at least three countries, including one EU member state.
routes.route_decision: Possible evidence/AI/chip design support route, but requires a Horizon consortium and topic-specific role; not a direct solo application.
routes.next_action: Prepare partner role note around evidence OS for chip design or supply-chain resilience and search for consortium calls.

routes.name: Advancing Sustainable AI Technology
routes.source_readback: UKRI future opportunities list shows August 2026 Advancing Sustainable AI Technology, total fund GBP10m with maximum award GBP500k, expected to proceed subject to approvals.
routes.route_decision: Strong thematic fit for Aureon open-source evidence and sustainable AI tooling, but the route is not open yet and eligibility details are not final.
routes.next_action: Create a pre-application evidence pack and monitor UKRI publication for eligibility and submission route.

routes.name: HMGCC Co-Creation Challenge: Smart personal assistant for security researchers
routes.source_readback: Challenge opened 16 March 2026 and closed 7 May 2026 17:00. It offered up to GBP60k for a 12-week funded challenge.
routes.route_decision: Technically relevant to Aureon evidence indexing and offline assistant work, but closed before 12 July 2026 and must not be treated as a live application.
routes.next_action: Use as past-fit intelligence only; monitor HMGCC for future similar challenges.

routes.name: Eurostars Call 11 for projects - September 2026
routes.source_readback: Eurostars Call 11 opened 9 July 2026 and closes 10 September 2026 at 14:00 CET. Consortium must be led by an innovative SME from a Eurostars country and include at least two independent entities from at least two Eurostars countries.
routes.route_decision: Good international R&D fit, but not a standalone submission route.
routes.next_action: Continue partner search; do not submit without independent international partner and national funding checks.

routes.name: InterTradeIreland Innovation Boost
routes.source_readback: InterTradeIreland Innovation Boost offers up to GBP56,000/EUR67,900 support for academic expertise and project manager salary contribution.
routes.route_decision: Directly relevant to R&A/Aureon once provider account/email verification is complete.
routes.next_action: Complete account/email verification and continue the provider enquiry/application route.

routes.name: AIRR Compute: AI Open Access
routes.source_readback: AIRR AI Open Access remains an active compute opportunity closing 17 July 2026 16:00 UK time; current Aureon Open Access application is already submitted.
routes.next_action: Monitor submitted application receipt and provider communications.

controls: No external form was submitted by this discovery run.
No email was sent by this discovery run.
Partner, consortium, clinical, cluster, account-verification, or not-yet-open routes remain gated until evidence changes.
